generation_method: Deterministic sinusoidal wind/scalar signals plus independent manual covariance oracle.
qc_mapping_strategy: No official EddyPro QC flags in this synthetic raw fixture.
known_limitations: Synthetic raw CSV fixture validates harness plumbing and numeric guardrails only.

Real .ghg, TOB1/SLT/binary, LI-7700, AoA/crosswind, and spectra/cospectra fixtures are still required.
